root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card, trim( sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename ) as prename, trim( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name ) || ' ' || trim( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname ) as memname, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc , sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_opened_date , sc_dep_m_creditor.froce_close_date , PKA_DEP_INTSRV.fp_intrate_depno( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no ) *100 as dep_int_rate , sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no ,
trim( sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_group_code ) || ' ' || trim( sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name ) as dep_type ,
sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance , tab2.seq_no FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_dep_m_rule, sc_dep_m_creditor ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type
,( select sum(1)over(order by sum_dep_balance desc ) as seq_no /*เทียบเท่า comulative sum ถ้าเอา 50 คน ก้อเอา seq_no <= 50 */ ,membership_no ,sum_dep_balance from ( select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,sum(sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance) as sum_dep_balance from sc_dep_m_creditor ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance > 0 and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no group by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no order by sum_dep_balance desc /*เรียงหนี้รวม จากมากไปหาน้อย*/ ) tab1 ) tab2 WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type ) and ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) and ( sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance > 0 ) ) and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = tab2.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type < '03' and tab2.seq_no <= 100 /*WHERE*/ order by seq_no ,sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance desc
